_meta.note: Batch 1 (5 files): automated regex extraction. Batch 2 (20 files): structured Sonnet reading pass. All entries require Opus synthesis pass for recommendation_strength. item_code assignments for cross-cutting slugs marked [CROSS-CUTTING] or [UNASSIGNED] pending ISW cross-reference validation. Qualitative specs (value_min/max None) record parameter existence without quantified threshold.
